content: We can reframe agent working memory capacity limits as a feature rather than a bug by building Chain of Hindsight into the memory pruning process: when an agent hits its working memory limit, it automatically generates a hindsight chain that summarizes, reflects on, and condenses past reasoning steps into natural language feedback to itself, replacing the raw extended context to free up working memory for new reasoning. This turns memory constraints actually trigger structured hindsight summarization that retains core insights while keeping the agent within its working memory bounds.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
